_comment: Task definitions for the Agent Orchestrator. Edit this file to add, remove, or schedule tasks.

tasks.name: Workspace Health Check
tasks.description: Scan workspace structure, check git history for recent changes, flag any concerns, and update memory.

tasks.name: Workspace Maintenance
tasks.description: Run autonomous maintenance cycle: health checks on all services, fix any broken scripts, send email if changes were made.

tasks.name: Docker Status Report
tasks.description: List all running and stopped Docker containers with CPU and memory usage. Report any containers that are down.

tasks.name: Docker Health Sweep
tasks.description: Check all Docker containers, restart any that are stopped, and report what was fixed.
